layers.name: Public API
layers.summary: The surface apps program against — clients, calls, requests/responses, URLs, headers, and pluggable SPIs.

classes.name: OkHttpClient
classes.description_zh: OkHttp 的核心客户端，承载全局配置并作为创建 Call 与 WebSocket 的工厂，建议全应用共享单例。
classes.description_en: The central, shareable client holding configuration and acting as the factory for Calls and WebSockets.

classes.name: Interceptor
classes.description_zh: OkHttp 的核心扩展点，可观察、改写、重试或短路请求与响应，串联成拦截器链。
classes.description_en: The core extension point — observes, rewrites, retries, or short-circuits requests/responses in a chain.

classes.name: MediaType
classes.description_zh: 表示 Content-Type 媒体类型（含可选字符集）的值对象。
classes.description_en: Value type modeling a Content-Type media type and its optional charset.

classes.name: Connection
classes.description_zh: 对一条服务器连接的公开视图，暴露其协议、路由与 TLS 握手信息。
classes.description_en: Public view of a live connection to the server, exposing its protocol, route, and TLS handshake.

classes.name: ResponseBody
classes.description_zh: 一次性、可流式读取的响应体，使用后必须关闭以释放连接。
classes.description_en: A one-shot, streamable response body that must be closed to release its connection.

classes.name: EventListener
classes.description_zh: 调用生命周期事件监听器，观测 DNS、连接、请求、响应等各阶段的指标与时序。
classes.description_en: Listener exposing the timeline of a call's lifecycle events (DNS, connect, request, response) for metrics.

classes.name: ConnectionPool
classes.description_zh: 连接池的公开门面，控制连接复用策略与空闲保活上限。
classes.description_en: Public facade over the connection pool, configuring reuse and idle keep-alive policy.

classes.name: Headers
classes.description_zh: 不可变、有序的 HTTP 头部名值对集合。
classes.description_en: An immutable, ordered set of HTTP header name/value pairs.

classes.name: Call
classes.description_zh: 一次已就绪、可执行（同步或异步）一次且可取消的请求调用句柄。
classes.description_en: A prepared request that can be executed exactly once — synchronously or asynchronously — and cancelled.

classes.name: Authenticator
classes.description_zh: 认证扩展点，在收到 401/407 质询时（或抢先地）为请求提供认证凭据。
classes.description_en: SPI for supplying credentials in reaction to server (401) or proxy (407) auth challenges, or preemptively.

classes.name: CertificatePinner
classes.description_zh: 证书锁定器，限制特定主机名所信任的证书，缓解 CA 失陷导致的中间人风险。
classes.description_en: Enforces certificate pinning, restricting which certificates are trusted for specified hostnames.

classes.name: Dns
classes.description_zh: 域名解析扩展点，将主机名解析为 IP 地址，默认使用系统 DNS。
classes.description_en: Pluggable SPI for resolving hostnames to IP addresses, defaulting to the system resolver.

classes.name: RequestBody
classes.description_zh: 待发送请求的消息体抽象，按需将内容流式写入网络。
classes.description_en: Abstraction for an outgoing request body that streams its content to the network.

classes.name: Handshake
classes.description_zh: 记录一次 TLS 握手的结果，包含协商出的密码套件、TLS 版本与对端证书链。
classes.description_en: Captures a connection's TLS handshake — negotiated cipher suite, TLS version, and peer certificates.

classes.name: Address
classes.description_zh: 描述如何连接到某个源服务器的规格，包含主机、端口、代理与 TLS 配置；地址相同的请求可共享连接。
classes.description_en: Specifies how to reach an origin server (host, port, proxy, TLS); requests with equal addresses can share a connection.

classes.name: Callback
classes.description_zh: 异步调用的回调接口，接收 Call 的成功响应或失败结果。
classes.description_en: Callback that receives the asynchronous outcome — response or failure — of an enqueued Call.

classes.name: Response
classes.description_zh: 不可变的 HTTP 响应模型，包含状态码、头部、响应体及连接元数据。
classes.description_en: An immutable HTTP response carrying status, headers, body, and connection metadata.

classes.name: Request
classes.description_zh: 不可变的 HTTP 请求模型，封装 URL、方法、头部与请求体。
classes.description_en: An immutable HTTP request — URL, method, headers, and body — built via its builder.

classes.name: Cache
classes.description_zh: 遵循 HTTP 缓存语义的响应缓存，将响应持久化到磁盘以减少网络请求。
classes.description_en: An HTTP response cache that stores responses on disk and serves them per HTTP caching rules.

classes.name: HttpUrl
classes.description_zh: 对 HTTP/HTTPS URL 的结构化、规范化表示，便于安全地构建与解析链接。
classes.description_en: A structured, validated model of an HTTP/HTTPS URL with safe building and parsing.

classes.name: Protocol
classes.description_zh: 枚举所支持的应用层协议（HTTP/1.1、HTTP/2、H2C 等）。
classes.description_en: Enum of the application-layer protocols OkHttp negotiates and speaks (HTTP/1.1, HTTP/2, H2C, …).

layers.name: Call Engine
layers.summary: Request execution: the interceptor chain plus redirect/retry, caching, and authentication bridging.

classes.name: SuppressSignatureCheck
classes.description_zh: 标记注解，用于将声明排除在 OkHttp 的公共 API 签名兼容性检查之外。
classes.description_en: Marker annotation that exempts a declaration from OkHttp's public-API signature compatibility check.

classes.name: DiskLruCache
classes.description_zh: 基于文件系统、容量受限的 LRU 缓存，是 HTTP 响应缓存的底层存储引擎。
classes.description_en: A filesystem-backed, size-bounded LRU cache that provides the storage engine behind the HTTP cache.

classes.name: CacheInterceptor
classes.description_zh: 缓存拦截器，按缓存策略从磁盘缓存返回响应或将新的网络响应写回缓存。
classes.description_en: Interceptor that serves requests from the HTTP cache and writes fresh network responses back into it.

classes.name: ExchangeCodec
classes.description_zh: 在连接上编码 HTTP 请求、解码响应的抽象接口，由 HTTP/1 与 HTTP/2 分别实现。
classes.description_en: Abstraction for encoding a request and decoding its response on a connection, implemented per protocol.

classes.name: CallServerInterceptor
classes.description_zh: 拦截器链中的最后一环，负责将请求写入网络并读取服务器的响应。
classes.description_en: The terminal interceptor that writes the request to the socket and reads the server's response off the wire.

classes.name: RetryAndFollowUpInterceptor
classes.description_zh: 重试与重定向拦截器，从可恢复的失败中重连，并跟随重定向与认证质询。
classes.description_en: Interceptor that recovers from recoverable failures and follows redirects and authentication challenges.

classes.name: BridgeInterceptor
classes.description_zh: 桥接拦截器，在用户请求与网络请求间转换，补全 Cookie、压缩、Content-Length 等标准头。
classes.description_en: Translates a user request into a network request (adding cookies, gzip, etc.) and back into a user response.

classes.name: RealInterceptorChain
classes.description_zh: 拦截器链的核心实现，将请求依次穿过应用拦截器、OkHttp 核心与网络拦截器。
classes.description_en: The concrete Interceptor.Chain that drives a request through application, core, and network interceptors.

classes.name: JavaNetAuthenticator
classes.description_zh: 将 JDK 的 java.net.Authenticator 适配为 OkHttp 的 Authenticator，复用系统认证配置。
classes.description_en: Adapts the JDK's java.net.Authenticator to OkHttp's Authenticator SPI for credential lookup.

layers.name: Connection Management
layers.summary: Route planning, connection pooling and reuse, and the per-exchange transmit plumbing.

classes.name: ConnectionListener
classes.description_zh: 连接生命周期事件的监听器，用于监控池中连接的建立与关闭。
classes.description_en: Listener hook for connection lifecycle events, used to monitor when pooled connections open and close.

classes.name: RealCall
classes.description_zh: Call 接口的核心实现，作为应用层与网络层的桥梁，驱动拦截器链执行一次请求。
classes.description_en: The concrete Call implementation bridging application and network layers and driving the interceptor chain.

classes.name: RealConnectionPool
classes.description_zh: 连接池的核心实现，负责连接的复用、保活与空闲淘汰。
classes.description_en: The connection pool that manages reuse, keep-alive, and eviction of idle HTTP and HTTP/2 connections.

classes.name: RealRoutePlanner
classes.description_zh: 路由规划器，枚举并按序选择连接时要尝试的路由（IP、代理、TLS 配置）。
classes.description_en: Plans and orders the candidate routes (IP addresses, proxies, TLS configs) to try when connecting.

classes.name: RealConnection
classes.description_zh: 指向远端服务器的实际连接，可承载一个或多个并发流，由连接池共享复用。
classes.description_en: A physical connection to a server, shared in the pool and able to carry one or more concurrent streams.

classes.name: Exchange
classes.description_zh: 负责传输单个请求/响应对，在 ExchangeCodec 之上叠加连接管理与事件回调。
classes.description_en: Carries a single request/response exchange, layering connection management and events over the wire codec.

classes.name: ConnectPlan
classes.description_zh: 对远端服务器的一次连接尝试，封装 TCP 握手、可选的代理 CONNECT 隧道与 TLS 握手等步骤。
classes.description_en: One attempt to establish a connection — TCP handshake, optional proxy CONNECT tunnel, and optional TLS handshake.

layers.name: Wire Protocols
layers.summary: On-the-wire codecs: HTTP/1.1, multiplexed HTTP/2, and WebSocket framing.

classes.name: Http1ExchangeCodec
classes.description_zh: HTTP/1.1 的编解码实现，按严格的读写生命周期在 socket 上收发请求与响应。
classes.description_en: Codec that reads and writes HTTP/1.1 messages over a socket following a strict lifecycle.

classes.name: Http2Connection
classes.description_zh: 管理一条多路复用的 HTTP/2 连接，负责其上的流、帧收发与流量控制。
classes.description_en: Manages a multiplexed HTTP/2 connection — its concurrent streams, frame I/O, and flow control.

classes.name: Header
classes.description_zh: 表示单个 HTTP/2 头部，名称为 ASCII、值为 UTF-8。
classes.description_en: Value type for one HTTP/2 header — an ASCII name paired with a UTF-8 value.

classes.name: Http2ExchangeCodec
classes.description_zh: 基于 HTTP/2 帧对请求与响应进行编解码的 ExchangeCodec 实现。
classes.description_en: ExchangeCodec implementation that encodes requests and decodes responses as HTTP/2 frames.

classes.name: RealWebSocket
classes.description_zh: WebSocket 的核心实现，负责升级握手、帧读写与消息收发及保活。
classes.description_en: The concrete WebSocket that drives the upgrade handshake, frame reader/writer, and message I/O.

layers.name: Security & TLS
layers.summary: Certificate pinning and chain cleaning, handshake material, and X.509/DER encoding.

classes.name: TlsUtil
classes.description_zh: 内部工具，从证书材料构造 KeyManager/TrustManager 等 TLS 组件。
classes.description_en: Internal helpers that assemble key managers and trust managers from certificate material.

classes.name: CertificateAdapters
classes.description_zh: 一组 DER（ASN.1）编解码适配器，在 X.509 结构与字节之间相互转换。
classes.description_en: Collection of DER/ASN.1 codecs that translate X.509 structures to and from their byte encoding.

classes.name: Certificate
classes.description_zh: X.509 证书的 DER 数据模型，用于证书的编码与解码。
classes.description_en: DER data model of an X.509 certificate used for encoding and decoding.

classes.name: CertificateChainCleaner
classes.description_zh: 证书链清理器，将服务器证书链规整并补全到受信任的根证书。
classes.description_en: Normalizes a server's certificate chain, pruning and ordering it up to a trusted root anchor.

classes.name: HandshakeCertificates
classes.description_zh: 打包 TLS 握手所需的密钥材料与信任配置，便于在测试或本地服务端搭建 TLS。
classes.description_en: Convenience holder of the key material and trust settings needed to drive a TLS handshake.

classes.name: HeldCertificate
classes.description_zh: 持有私钥的证书对象，用于以编程方式生成 TLS 测试证书与证书链。
classes.description_en: A certificate paired with its private key, used to programmatically mint TLS certificates and chains.

layers.name: Platform & Runtime
layers.summary: JVM/Android TLS & ALPN integration, task scheduling, and concurrency primitives.

classes.name: Platform
classes.description_zh: 平台能力抽象基类，封装不同 JVM/Android 在 TLS、ALPN、信任管理等方面的差异。
classes.description_en: Base abstraction over platform-specific TLS, ALPN, and trust-manager features, with per-runtime subclasses.

classes.name: Lockable
classes.description_zh: 标记接口，标识使用 JVM 内建 synchronized/wait/notify 机制加锁的对象。
classes.description_en: Marker interface for objects that coordinate via the JVM's intrinsic synchronized/wait/notify locking.

classes.name: TaskRunner
classes.description_zh: 任务调度器，在共享工作线程上调度并执行各任务队列中的后台任务。
classes.description_en: Scheduler that runs queued background tasks across a shared pool of worker threads.

classes.name: AndroidPlatform
classes.description_zh: 针对较旧 Android 版本的平台适配实现，处理其 TLS、ALPN 与信任管理差异。
classes.description_en: Platform adapter for older Android versions, bridging their TLS, ALPN, and trust-manager quirks.

classes.name: Android10Platform
classes.description_zh: 针对 Android 10（API 29+）的平台适配实现，使用其原生 TLS 与 ALPN 能力。
classes.description_en: Platform adapter specialized for Android 10+ (API 29+), using its native TLS and ALPN APIs.

classes.name: AndroidSocketAdapter
classes.description_zh: 基于反射的 SocketAdapter，用于在 Android 上对接 Conscrypt 的 SSLSocket。
classes.description_en: Reflection-based socket adapter that drives Conscrypt's SSLSocket on Android.

layers.name: Feature Modules & Tools
layers.summary: Optional artifacts: logging, DNS-over-HTTPS, SSE, cookies, the okcurl CLI, and MockWebServer.

classes.name: RealEventSource
classes.description_zh: 服务器推送事件（SSE）的核心实现，解析事件流并回调监听器。
classes.description_en: The concrete Server-Sent Events source that reads and dispatches an SSE stream to its listener.

classes.name: JavaNetCookieJar
classes.description_zh: 委托给 java.net.CookieHandler 的 CookieJar 实现，桥接 JDK 的 Cookie 管理。
classes.description_en: A CookieJar that delegates cookie storage to the JDK's java.net.CookieHandler.

classes.name: DnsOverHttps
classes.description_zh: DNS-over-HTTPS 的 Dns 实现，通过 HTTPS 请求完成域名解析。
classes.description_en: A Dns implementation that resolves hostnames over HTTPS per the DNS-over-HTTPS spec.

classes.name: RecordedRequest
classes.description_zh: MockWebServer 记录的入站请求，供测试断言客户端实际发送的内容。
classes.description_en: An inbound request captured by MockWebServer so tests can assert on what the client sent.

classes.name: MockWebServer
classes.description_zh: 可编排的进程内 Web 服务器，用于在测试中模拟 HTTP 服务端行为。
classes.description_en: A scriptable, in-process web server that replays canned responses for testing HTTP clients.

classes.name: MockResponse
classes.description_zh: 预设的脚本化响应，供 MockWebServer 在测试中按序回放。
classes.description_en: A canned, scripted response that MockWebServer replays to a client during tests.

classes.name: LoggingEventListener
classes.description_zh: 记录调用各阶段事件与耗时的 EventListener 实现，便于诊断连接与请求过程。
classes.description_en: An EventListener that logs the sequence and timing of a call's lifecycle events.

classes.name: HttpLoggingInterceptor
classes.description_zh: 日志拦截器，按可配置级别记录请求/响应的行、头与消息体。
classes.description_en: Interceptor that logs request and response lines, headers, and bodies at a configurable verbosity.

classes.name: Main
classes.description_zh: okcurl 命令行工具的入口，从命令行参数构造并发起一次 HTTP 请求。
classes.description_en: Entry point of the okcurl CLI that builds and issues an HTTP request from command-line arguments.

layers.name: Tests, Samples & Support
layers.summary: Unit/integration tests, recipes and sample apps, and testing helpers — kept apart from the library.
